73127336.title: 2023–24 Swindon Town F.C. season

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: 145th season in existence of Swindon Town FC

73127336.description: 145th season in existence of Swindon Town FC
73127336.extract: The 2023–24 season is the 145th season in the history of Swindon Town and their third consecutive season in League Two. The club are participating in League Two, the FA Cup, the EFL Cup, and the EFL Trophy.
